title: Play-doh ball metaphor — early roommate decision, Mar 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-line note. Yahir captures a vivid metaphor for what life feels like at the moment: "Feeling of trying to shape a play-doh ball into a sphere or elliptical sphere type of shape."
  • Operational decision recorded: Ayden accepted the barb role — barb being a FBLA-era / osu-friend-group role that needs disambiguation later.
  • Hard-stop decision about future housing: "Can't be roommates with the fellas, will clash." — the first explicit no in the corpus on rooming with the boys he'd later wedding-list (2025 06 22 wedding list).
  • Ends with a link to a motivational interviewing values card-sort PDF (motivationalinterviewing.org) — earliest evidence of Yahir using values-clarification frameworks formally.

Key quote

"Feeling of trying to shape a play-doh ball into a sphere or elliptical sphere type of shape."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The play-doh metaphor is a shaping the formless flavor — pairs with later "what makes the colors more vibrant" line in 2022 05 14 have trouble being honest about myself and the "sandboard our own grooves" frame in 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future.
  • Roommate-with-the-fellas refusal foreshadows the eventual austin tx solo move (Memory) and the "lonely; building solo" line.
  • Values card-sort link is a research thread — Yahir using clinical tools on himself, like the journaling form in 2024 04 27 sam breakup script.

Open questions

  • Who did he actually room with at OSU after this decision?
  • Did the values card-sort get filled out and saved anywhere?

Wikilinks
